framework_name: FFIEC IT Examination Handbook — Operations booklet

controls.title: Operations Function Documentation
controls.description: The IT operations function operates under documented procedures covering daily processing, monitoring, + escalation responsibilities.

controls.title: Operations Run Books
controls.description: Critical-system run books document startup, shutdown, recovery, + routine-maintenance procedures with sufficient detail for operations staff to follow without designer involvement.

controls.title: Shift Handoff + Communication
controls.description: Shift transitions follow documented handoff procedures ensuring continuity of issue tracking + situational awareness.

controls.title: Job Scheduling + Monitoring
controls.description: Production batch jobs are scheduled, monitored, + alerted through documented automation; job failures trigger documented escalation paths.

controls.title: Real-Time Transaction Monitoring
controls.description: Real-time payment + transaction processing systems have documented monitoring + alerting on volume, latency, + error rates.

controls.title: Batch Cycle Management
controls.description: Daily / monthly / quarterly batch cycles have documented schedules + completion criteria; cycle failures escalate to management on documented timelines.

controls.title: Server + Storage Provisioning
controls.description: Server + storage capacity is provisioned through a documented process aligned with capacity-planning forecasts.

controls.title: Network Operations + Monitoring
controls.description: Network infrastructure is monitored 24x7 with documented performance + availability thresholds + alerting.

controls.title: Data Center Physical Operations
controls.description: Data centers (owned or co-located) operate under documented environmental controls (power, cooling, fire, physical access).

controls.title: Cloud Infrastructure Operations
controls.description: Cloud-hosted infrastructure operates under shared-responsibility documentation with provider; operations team maintains visibility into provider service-level + incident posture.

controls.title: Backup Schedule + Retention
controls.description: Backup schedules + retention periods are documented + aligned with the institution's RPO commitments + retention requirements.

controls.title: Backup Restoration Testing
controls.description: Backup restoration is tested on a documented cadence (typically at least annually for critical systems) to confirm restorability.

controls.title: Off-Site Backup Storage
controls.description: Backup media (or replication targets) are stored off-site at sufficient geographic distance to survive regional disasters.

controls.title: Backup Encryption + Integrity
controls.description: Backups are encrypted at rest + during transmission; integrity-verification (hash check) confirms backup validity before relying on it for recovery.

controls.title: Incident Management Process
controls.description: IT incidents are logged, classified, + tracked through a documented incident-management process with defined SLAs by severity.

controls.title: Major Incident Communication
controls.description: Major incidents trigger documented stakeholder communication (business management, customer service, regulators where applicable) on documented timelines.

controls.title: Problem Management + Root-Cause Analysis
controls.description: Recurring incidents trigger problem-management investigations with documented root-cause analysis + permanent-fix tracking.

controls.title: Post-Incident Review
controls.description: Major incidents undergo documented post-incident review covering: timeline, root cause, response effectiveness, + improvement actions.

controls.title: Capacity Monitoring
controls.description: Production system capacity (CPU, memory, storage, network, I/O) is monitored against documented thresholds with alerting on saturation risk.

controls.title: Performance Tuning + Optimization
controls.description: Performance issues identified through monitoring trigger documented tuning + optimization activities; persistent issues escalate to capacity-planning review.

controls.title: Capacity Forecasting
controls.description: Capacity forecasting uses historical-trend analysis + planned-growth assumptions to project capacity needs over a documented horizon (typically 12-24 months).

controls.title: BC/DR Plan Maintenance
controls.description: Business continuity + disaster recovery plans are documented + refreshed on a documented cadence (typically annually) + after material changes.

controls.title: BC/DR Testing
controls.description: BC/DR plans are tested on a documented cadence; test scope + results are documented with identified gaps + remediation tracking.

controls.title: Recovery Time + Point Objectives
controls.description: Documented RTO + RPO commitments per critical system are consistent with backup schedules + recovery infrastructure capability.

controls.title: Pandemic + Workforce Continuity
controls.description: Pandemic / workforce-continuity scenarios (mass remote work, key-person illness) are addressed in BC plans with documented mitigations.

controls.title: Operations Performance Dashboards
controls.description: Operational performance is reported via dashboards covering uptime, incidents, change success rate, capacity utilization.

controls.title: Periodic Operations Review with Management
controls.description: Operations leadership reviews performance + risk indicators with senior management on a documented cadence.
